metadata.sysdescription: The Memoras Free Zone is the Confederation’s great bazaar — a chaotic frontier world where trade, innovation, and revelry blur together. Located on the edge of Ximni-controlled space, Memoras orbits a binary star that floods the skies in constant aurorae. The world’s capital, Doxx City, is infamous for its floating taverns, neon airships, and open-air trade domes. Merchants from across the USFP and even the Hegemony conduct business here, protected by local neutrality laws. Memoras is also home to the Circle of Xim, a semi-religious order of storytellers and philosophers who record and judge acts of courage across the Confederation.
